title: White Vinegar | Food Grade | Suitable for Cleaning, Weed Killer, Limescale Remover, Glass Cleaner, Stain Remover, Baking, Pickling, Marinating | UK Made | Pack of 3 x 1 Litres
description: Product description 3 x 1 Litre Food Grade White Vinegar The complete multi-purpose tool in any household cupboard our Flow Food Grade White Vinegar provides a natural and economical means of keeping windows, bathrooms and kitchen worktop surfaces clean. Containing 5 acetic, this vinegar is powerful enough to cut through stubborn stains without damaging surfaces, making it a highly-versatile household cleaning agent. White vinegar can also be used to improve the performance of laundry detergent, extend the life of cut flowers, clean your pets' ears or even get rid of pesky garden weeds! There is much more to do with this product we couldn't list it all...Google Vinegar uses and see. Ingredients Cleaner
